narrative.description: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive is a round-based tactical shooter where terrorists and counter-terrorists fight over bomb plants, defusals, and hostage rescues with economy management.
narrative.core_loop: Win rounds through precise gunplay and utility usage, earn money for weapons and gear, coordinate site executes or retakes, and win 16 rounds to take the match.

mechanics.map_notes: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.
mechanics.expression: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.

mechanics.map_notes: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, zoomed aim mode trades movement speed for accuracy and range.
mechanics.expression: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, zoomed aim mode trades movement speed for accuracy and range.

mechanics.map_notes: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, units gain defensive bonuses from terrain cover and flanking angles on a tactical grid.
mechanics.expression: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, units gain defensive bonuses from terrain cover and flanking angles on a tactical grid.

mechanics.map_notes: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.
mechanics.expression: In Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Counter-Strike: Global Offensive through its core tactical fps loop.
